final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial panoramic illustration of the Lantern Festival in Tang Dynasty Chang'an, with thousands of lanterns illuminating the night sky.

Style/medium: Gongbi heavy-color painting, traditional Chinese scroll format, meticulous brushwork with layered mineral pigments
Composition: sweeping panoramic bird's-eye view of the entire city, wide horizontal scroll format, multiple layers of depth from foreground streets to distant palace walls
Subject: thousands of hanging lanterns in various shapes (round, hexagonal, palace-style), crowds in Tang dynasty attire, festival vendors, performers, architecture with upturned eaves
Scene/backdrop: Tang Dynasty Chang'an city at night, bustling West Market and East Market streets, palace complex in the distance, city walls and gates visible
Lighting/mood: warm golden lantern glow against deep indigo night sky, festive and celebratory atmosphere, soft ambient light from countless small sources
Color palette: deep indigo and black night sky as base, warm amber and vermillion lantern light as anchor, touches of gold and jade green for architectural details
Materials/textures: silk scroll texture visible, delicate ink outlines, layered mineral pigment washes, subtle gold leaf accents on lantern frames
Avoid: modern electric lighting, anachronistic elements, oversaturated colors, Western perspective distortion, photorealistic rendering
